strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the tenure floor with demonstrable breadth
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing current engagement with agentic workflows and developer platforms
Founder of GISCollective and open-source project maintainer (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Vibe.dav) — demonstrates entrepreneurial builder instinct within larger career context
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; dual Bachelor's in CS and Fine Arts does not satisfy the preferred Master's/PhD qualification for a role centered on AI strategy
Career titles peak at Staff/Senior Software Developer — no evidence of operating at director-level IC scope, cross-org influence, or advising strategic customers and partners
AI engagement is recent and narrow (current role only); no recognized AI thought leadership, published research, or demonstrated AI-powered products at scale that the role explicitly requires
response.justification: Bogdan brings a long and varied engineering career with genuine breadth across stacks and domains, and his current work on MCP frameworks and agentic tooling shows timely upskilling in AI infrastructure. However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role requires a candidate who is already a recognized authority in AI, capable of advising enterprise customers and shaping organizational strategy at director level — a profile Bogdan has not yet grown into. His AI work is nascent rather than foundational, his titles reflect individual execution rather than strategic influence, and there is no evidence of the external thought leadership or large-scale AI product ownership the role demands.
